bg_left_holds: a traditional Japanese ichimatsu doll (kimono-dressed, with painted face) in her arms, gently cradling it against her chest as if reluctant to part with a family heirloom
bg_right_holds: a small wooden jewelry-style display box containing a beautifully preserved Japanese hina doll, holding it forward with both hands at chest level as if presenting it for appraisal
subtitle: 元買取8年が暴く本音相場
